'''hahogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sviatonossite|sviatonossite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sviatonossite|sviatonossite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hahogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæhegeth|hæhegeth]] || [[word:hæhegej|hæhegej]] || [[word:hæhegesh|hæhegesh]] || [[word:hæhege|hæhege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hahohogoth|hahohogoth]] || [[word:hahohogoj|hahohogoj]] || [[word:hahohogosh|hahohogosh]] || [[word:hahohogo|hahohogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hahogoth|hahogoth]] || [[word:hahogoj|hahogoj]] || [[word:hahogosh|hahogosh]] || [[word:hahogo|hahogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hahofgoth|hahofgoth]] || [[word:hahofgoj|hahofgoj]] || [[word:hahofgosh|hahofgosh]] || [[word:hahofgof|hahofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hahogotho|hahogotho]] || [[word:hahogojo|hahogojo]] || [[word:hahogosho|hahogosho]] || [[word:hahogoko|hahogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hahogoth|hahogoth]] || [[word:hahogoj|hahogoj]] || [[word:hahogosh|hahogosh]] || [[word:hahogo|hahogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hahogothol|hahogothol]] || [[word:hahogojol|hahogojol]] || [[word:hahogoshol|hahogoshol]] || [[word:hahogokol|hahogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hahogothotho|hahogothotho]] || [[word:hahogojojo|hahogojojo]] || [[word:hahogoshosho|hahogoshosho]] || [[word:hahogoko|hahogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hahogothon|hahogothon]] || [[word:hahogojon|hahogojon]] || [[word:hahogoshon|hahogoshon]] || [[word:hahogokon|hahogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hahogothoro|hahogothoro]] || [[word:hahogojoro|hahogojoro]] || [[word:hahogoshoro|hahogoshoro]] || [[word:hahogokoro|hahogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
